ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, province, country) */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the province the location belongs to */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the location belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the location */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the location was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the location */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the location was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the location is active */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the location */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the province belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the province */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the province was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the province */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the province was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the province is active */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the province */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provinces_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the country */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the country was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the country */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the country was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the country is active */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country */,
  "government" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the location */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the location was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being updated */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_field" TEXT /* Field that was changed (e.g., location_name, location_type) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_boundaries" (
  "boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the boundary belongs to */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of boundary (e.g., polygon, line) */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the boundary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_boundaries_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_neighbors" (
  "neighbor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbor relationship */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "neighbor_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighboring location */,
  "neighbor_distance" REAL /* Distance between the locations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_neighbors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_neighbors_neighbor_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbor_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_group_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location that is a member of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_group_members_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES location_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_tags_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_tag_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_tag_category_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category member */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag that is a member of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_tag_category_members_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES location_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_tag_category_members_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES location_tag_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., thumbnail, full-size) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_images_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of the video (e.g., presentation, tutorial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_videos_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location the document belongs to */,
  "document_url" TEXT /* URL of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, Word) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_documents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
